meta.title: Forest Poker
meta.description: Buy-in / buy-out tracker for home games

auth.embeddedPreviewBody: Google sign-in does not work inside Cursor’s embedded browser. Use Chrome or Edge with the same URL (e.g. http://localhost:3000).
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not allowed for Firebase sign-in. In Firebase Console → Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains, add your App Hosting hostname (the …hosted.app URL, no :8080 port).
errors.sessionCookie: Sign-in worked, but the server could not create a session cookie. In App Hosting environment variables, verify FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL and FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY match your Firebase service account.
errors.providerDisabled: That sign-in method is disabled in Firebase Authentication → Sign-in method.
errors.emailInUse: That email is already registered. Sign in instead.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.popupBlocked: Your browser blocked the Google pop-up. Allow pop-ups for this site and try again.
errors.popupClosed: Google sign-in was cancelled or the window closed before finishing.

onboarding.title: Pick a username
onboarding.subtitle: Shown on games and ledgers. Lowercase letters, numbers, underscore.
onboarding.noEmail: Your account has no email on file. Sign out and sign in with Google or email.
onboarding.failed: Could not save your username. Try again.

games.title: Games
games.ledgerWhenOpen: Ledger unlocks after you open the table.
games.closeConfirm: Close this game and compute settlements? Totals must balance to ₪0.
games.nonMemberHint: Join the game to add buy-ins or close.
games.balanceError: Cannot close: net totals must sum to zero.
games.deleteGameConfirm: Permanently delete this game and all players, ledger rows, and settlements? This cannot be undone.
games.deleteGameWarning: Danger zone — removes all data for this game.
games.deleteGameForbidden: You don’t have permission to delete games.
games.deleteGameFailed: Could not delete the game. Try again.
games.cancelGameConfirm: Cancel this scheduled game and remove it for everyone? This cannot be undone.
games.cancelGameForbidden: Only the host can cancel this game.
games.cancelGameBadState: This game can’t be cancelled (it’s no longer scheduled).
games.cancelGameFailed: Could not cancel the game. Try again.

career.title: Career
career.subtitle: Games you played
career.empty: No completed games with you yet.

league.title: League
league.subtitle: Lifetime net across closed games — sorted by total winnings
league.empty: No closed games yet — standings will show once games finish.
